name: lsa
description: Living Spec Architecture — spec-first development methodology where specs are the permanent source of truth and every code/artifact change traces to a spec requirement. Ten skills + one agent: new (start feature), next (pick backlog item), discover (specify + discover), plan, implement (orchestrator — dispatches to developer agent), verify, init, reconcile, revise-constitution. Developer agent: principal-engineer-level TDD with design-first phases (user flow, data flow, quality/security/performance/observability, testing-pyramid reasoning). Main flow: discover → plan → implement → verify. Flow-aware (Quick/Standard/Extended) via core/flow-selector. Path-configurable via .lsa.yaml.
